CREATE TABLE bitstrings (id INTEGER, b1 BITSTRING, b2 BITSTRING);
SELECT id, xor(b1, b2) FROM bitstrings;
CREATE TABLE additional_bits (id INTEGER, b3 BITSTRING);
SELECT a.id, xor(a.b1, b.b3) FROM bitstrings a JOIN additional_bits b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT id, xor(xor(b1, b2), '010'::BITSTRING) FROM bitstrings;
WITH xor_results AS (SELECT id, xor(b1, b2) AS result FROM bitstrings) SELECT id, result FROM xor_results WHERE result = '100'::BITSTRING;
SELECT id, b1, b2, xor(b1, b2) AS xor_result FROM (SELECT b1, b2 FROM bitstrings WHERE id IN (1, 2)) AS subquery;
SELECT id, xor('110'::BITSTRING, '001'::BITSTRING) AS new_xor FROM bitstrings WHERE id <= 2;
CREATE TABLE complex_binaries (id INTEGER, b1 BITSTRING, b2 BITSTRING, b3 BITSTRING);
SELECT id, xor(xor(b1, b2), b3) AS final_xor FROM complex_binaries;
